title: Wicked Charred Greek Chicken Revithia
description: A smoky, one-pot Greek chicken dish that balances charred flavor with the subtle sweetness of rice syrup, served over a bed of tender mirepoix. Perfect for a keto-friendly dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Add chicken pieces, season with salt and pepper, and brown on all sides, then transfer to plate.
In the same skillet, add remaining oil, onion, carrot, celery; cook until softened and lightly charred, about 5 minutes.
Stir in mushrooms and cook another 2 minutes.
Return chicken to skillet; pour in rice syrup, red wine vinegar, oregano, thyme; stir to coat.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes until chicken is cooked through and flavors meld.
Uncover, increase heat to medium, and let the liquid reduce until thick and glossy, about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh oregano or parsley.
